question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/subscribe/rest/RestSubscriber.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: clientSubscribe()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a non-network DoS by triggering continuous HTTP 404 responses from the mirror node REST API, causing `shouldRetry()` to return true on every attempt and exhausting all threads in `Schedulers.parallel()` through unbounded retry storms across all active `RestSubscription` instances?
